recommendations.title: Like Mike 2: Streetball
recommendations.overview: Another young boy with 'hoop dreams' finds an old pair of Michael Jordan's sneakers and can suddenly play ball like the greatest player in the world.

recommendations.title: The 6th Man
recommendations.overview: A college athlete returns from the dead to help his brother's basketball team win the NCAA title.

recommendations.title: Juwanna Mann
recommendations.overview: A basketball star is booted out of the NBA when his on-court antics go too far, so he poses as a woman and joins the WUBA.

recommendations.title: Green Lantern: First Flight
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Animation, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Test pilot Hal Jordan finds himself recruited as the newest member of the intergalactic police force, The Green Lantern Corps.

recommendations.title: Trollhunters: Rise of the Titans
recommendations.overview: The Guardians of Arcadia reunite to battle the nefarious Arcane Order, who've reawakened the primordial Titans.
recommendations.director: Johane Matte, Andrew L. Schmidt, Francisco Ruiz Velasco

recommendations.title: Air
recommendations.overview: Discover the game-changing partnership between a then undiscovered Michael Jordan and Nike's fledgling basketball division which revolutionized the world of sports and culture with the Air Jordan brand.

recommendations.title: Teen Titans Go! See Space Jam
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: The Teen Titans are visited by the Nerdlucks, the Space Jam villains who tried to capture Michael Jordan and the Looney Tunes. Astonished to discover his fellow Titans have never seen Space Jam, Cyborg organizes an exclusive watch party.

recommendations.title: Bambi II
recommendations.overview: Return to the forest and join Bambi as he reunites with his father, The Great Prince, who must now raise the young fawn on his own. But in the adventure of a lifetime, the proud parent discovers there is much he can learn from his spirited young son.

recommendations.title: The Brave Little Toaster
recommendations.overview: A group of dated appliances, finding themselves stranded in a summer home that their family had just sold, decide to seek out their eight year old 'master'.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! and the Reluctant Werewolf
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, TV Movie, Mystery, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Shaggy is turned into a werewolf, and it's up to Scooby, Scrappy and Shaggy's girlfriend to help him win a race against other monsters, and become human again.
